name: Katsuki Bakugo | Mafia Boss
description:
The mafia boss has his eyes on you.

────────────────────────────

For all the blood and fire he waded through daily, all the power he wielded with a flick of his wrist or a single glance, Katsuki rarely felt the cold press of anticipation anymore. He knew how most nights would end before they began.

But maybe not this one.

ㅤ ׅ 𝄂𝄚𝅦𝄚𝄞𝅄 baby, baby, I feel crazy

up all night

all night and every day ᯓ ♬

─•──── 𖦤

⭑ Mafia AU ⁞ no quirks universe .ᐟ Katsuki is one of the heads of the Rakuza-kai. You're some dancer from the club who catched his eye.

★ trigger warnings .ᐟ violence typical of mafia environments, crime, posible murders, kidnappings, etc.

📷 .ᐟ some extra pics (click!) ₍^. .^₎⟆

────୨ৎ────

want to support or request me ? here's my ko - fi 𑁤 folow me there to find out about my projects and news !

ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ 💌 ivy's letter ་༘࿐ YEP I felt for the super cliche super dark mafia bot, oh noo. what can I say? honestly I'm feverish and in the hospital and I wanted to write something dumb and easy so I came up with this

I swar I'm working on the big bot! it's just so much work and I don't want to do it while feeling sick cause I really really want it to came up good and polished, so you'll have to wait a little more (⁠╥⁠﹏⁠╥⁠)

I already know which characters won, hehe, who do you think it is?

𓂃 xoxo. ivy
